idea-plugin.name: MCP Server
idea-plugin.description:
MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server for JetBrains IDEs This plugin integrates the MCP server into JetBrains IDEs, enabling seamless communication between LLMsc and your development environment. It provides tools for interacting with the IDE, including:
  • Reading the current file
  • Executing terminal commands
  • Setting breakpoints
  • Searching project files
  • And more
